picks.title: Campbell Library Grand Reopening
picks.why: Campbell's newly renovated library opens with lion dancers and community celebration—a rare ribbon-cutting moment.

picks.title: 8th Annual International Mother Language Festival: Art & Celebration
picks.why: Sat, May 9 2:00 PM: Celebrate cultural diversity through art and live performances at the International Mother Language Festival.

picks.title: Berryessa Art Festival
picks.why: The 49th Berryessa Art Festival draws thousands for a full day of art, food, and community—don't miss this annual tradition.

picks.title: FOPAL Book Sale
picks.why: Sun, May 10 1:00 PM: Over 70,000 books, CDs, and puzzles at unbeatable prices—FOPAL's legendary monthly sale.

picks.title: Bay FC AANHPI Heritage Match
picks.why: Sun, May 10: Bay FC celebrates AANHPI Heritage with women's soccer and family-friendly activities at PayPal Park.
